description: CompositionPurple sleeveless tunic top made of knitted, blended viscose fabric, has a round neck, slash detail on the chest, flaring tucks from the midriff and skirt gathered at the sides to create slightly puffed shapeFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, leggings (or tights) and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
